title: Melted Saudi Apples Croquettes
description: Floral, cheese-pull inspired croquettes made with braeburn apples and a deep-fry technique, perfect for a plant-based solo dinner.
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine diced apples, maple syrup, cinnamon, cardamom, and cloves; mix until apples are well coated.
Stir in oat flour, almond milk, and nutritional yeast until a thick, sticky dough forms.
Let the mixture rest for 5 minutes to thicken.
Shape the dough into small oval croquettes, about 2 inches long.
Place the croquettes in a shallow dish and coat each with panko breadcrumbs, pressing lightly to adhere.
Heat olive oil in a deep pan over medium heat until shimmering.
Fry the croquettes in batches, turning once, until golden brown and crispy, about 3 minutes per side.
Transfer the fried croquettes to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil before serving.
